title: Adornment
description: A decorative mod adding all the things my friends and I have wanted in Minecraft for a long time. More Chiseled Stone, Colored Bricks, Wallpaper, and more!
body: This is my first attempt at making a mod, and its a mod that adds things that I personally have wanted in Minecraft for a while, things like wallpaper, which can be crafted with every dye (coming soon), colored bricks, all varients, custom furniture, stone tile blocks, etc.
